[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Drop abandoned HelloCash/POS invoice DAO endpoints (PR8b/c)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1088
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/345
  
  Details:
  Dropped the abandoned HelloCash/POS invoice DAO endpoints from Edgar (Rails) instead of porting them.
  
  Per Gary (2026-06-07): the HelloCash payment/invoice flow is abandoned (Hans Martin not following up), so express_submit_contribution + link_upc are deleted, not ported to dao_protocol.
  
  - Verified both were called only by the dormant POS invoice integration (heierling-pos / point-of-sales-integrations create_invoice.html) and that their backing services have no other callers.
  - Removed dao#express_submit_contribution, dao#link_upc, their routes + skip_before_action entries, the orphaned HelloCashService / Gdrive::InvoicesSheet / Gdrive::UpcBarcodeSheet, the invoice-only private helpers, and dead HelloCash config (incl. a hardcoded API token). ~1,117 lines; ruby -c clean; no specs referenced the surface.
  - Updated the PR8 roadmap: PR8b/PR8c -> DROPPED; remaining /dao/* work = PR8a nginx ramp then PR8d delete of the 3 ported actions.
  
  PRs: sentiment_importer#1088, agentic_ai_context#345.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
